calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-20-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Protection Roofing Co., a corporation, a/k/a Protection Roofing, Co., a/k/a Protection Roofing Co, a/k/a Protection Roofing, Inc., and IM Roofing Co., a corporation, a/k/a IM Roofing Co., a/k/a Im Roofing Co.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Michael Shintaku, CSR #8251. Telephone: 408-410-8040. Email: emailformike@hotmail.com.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Luther Jao, Senior Collections Agent for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Protection Roofing Co., a corporation, a/k/a Protection Roofing, Co., a/k/a Protection Roofing Co, a/k/a Protection Roofing, Inc., or IM Roofing Co., a corporation, a/k/a IM Roofing Co., a/k/a Im Roofing Co.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract/Open Book Account was filed on February 20, 2019 and personally served on the registered Agent of Process for defendants Protection Roofing Co., a corporation, a/k/a Protection Roofing, Co., a/k/a Protection Roofing Co, a/k/a Protection Roofing, Inc., and IM Roofing Co., a corporation, a/k/a IM Roofing Co., a/k/a Im Roofing Co., on August 18, 2019.
Default as to both defendants was entered on September 27, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 3, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc., and against the defaulted defendants Protection Roofing Co., a corporation, a/k/a Protection Roofing, Co., a/k/a Protection Roofing Co, a/k/a Protection Roofing, Inc., and IM Roofing Co., a corporation, a/k/a IM Roofing Co., a/k/a Im Roofing Co., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,501.54.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,612.51.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $756.70.

Total - $40,070.75.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
